reviews.comment:
Cuando está el camión descargando combustible, si llegas a Mardel ni dudes. Rajá

(Translated by Google)
When the truck is unloading fuel, if you get to Mar del Plata, don't hesitate. Get out of there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaWNMbUJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un ACA que trabaja muchísimo y aún así tiene una atención muy buena. Al lugar no le falta nada y es, como debe ser, un oasis en la ruta. Felicitaciones.

(Translated by Google)
This ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) works incredibly hard and still provides excellent service. The place has everything you could need and is, as it should be, an oasis on the road. Congratulations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKN3VQT01BEAE
